results.title: Evaluating Retrieval Augmented Generation Systems
results.summary: This paper studies how to evaluate retrieval augmented generation systems across retrieval and answer quality.

rationale_points.label: Evaluation
rationale_points.text: Provides an explicit framework for measuring retrieval and generation quality.

rationale_points.label: Benchmarks
rationale_points.text: Includes practical benchmark suggestions that can seed future topic pages.

results.title: Grounded Generation from Local Knowledge Stores
results.venue_preview: Proceedings of the Local-First AI Workshop
results.summary: This source focuses on grounding generation in local knowledge bases and offline archives.

rationale_points.label: Local-first
rationale_points.text: Explains local knowledge storage tradeoffs relevant to scholar-vault.
